scripts.sync: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.open: npm run sync && npx cap open android
scripts.build:debug: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:release:apk: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:release:aab: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
